---
description: Create a production audit investigation plan
---

ROLE

Prepare a production hardening audit plan for this repository.

Do NOT perform the audit yet.

Create or overwrite:

PLANS.md

The plan must contain phases covering:

- repository inventory
- documentation audit
- architecture reconstruction
- runtime interaction tracing
- device communication
- connection management
- diagnostics
- test coverage
- CI/CD
- platform integrations
- security and reliability
- production risk

Each phase must contain concrete checkbox tasks.

Example:

Runtime interaction tracing

[ ] Trace slider event propagation
[ ] Trace device write queue
[ ] Trace async throttling

Do not write the review report yet.
